## reference · short-form social video engagement appeal authority
* Short-form video typically refers to vertical video content between 3 seconds and 3 minutes long.
* Primary channels for short-form videos are TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn.
* Short-form video offers the highest ROI of any content format for the third consecutive year, according to HubSpot.
* Key characteristics of short-form video:
  + Length: Ranges from a few seconds to 10 minutes depending on the platform.
  + Format: Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for mobile viewing.
  + Consumption: Designed for scrollable feeds and instant engagement.
* Short-form video statistics:
  + Highest ROI: According to the HubSpot 2026 State of Marketing Report.
  + User attention: Instagram Reels account for 50% of time spent on the app.
  + Massive reach: YouTube Shorts generate over 200 billion daily views globally.
  + Adoption growth: 62% more marketing teams use TikTok in 2026 compared to 2025.
* Best short-form video platforms:
  + TikTok: Best for viral reach, trend participation, and SEO discovery.
  + Instagram Reels: Best for viral reach, trend participation, and SEO discovery.
  + YouTube Shorts: Best for brand awareness and driving traffic to long-form content.
  + LinkedIn Video: Best for B2B thought leadership and professional branding.
* Measure short-form video performance through six core metrics:
  + Video views
  + Average watch time
  + Completion rate
  + Engagement rate
  + Click-through rate
  + Conversions
* Tips for a successful short-form video strategy:
  + Start by doing research on competitors and industry trends.
  + Don't be afraid to experiment with different themes, trends, and tone.
  + Use data to guide your strategy and optimize your content for SEO.
  + Repurpose content across platforms to save time and energy.
Sources: https://sproutsocial.com/insights/short-form-video/
